text: This is a big run — turn 3 is doing extensive research. Let me check what's happening:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "RUN_DIR=$(ls -dt /tmp/claude_captures/run_* | head -1) && ls \"$RUN_DIR\" | grep \"_summary.txt$\" | grep -v response | sed 's/_[0-9]*.*//' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn", "description": "Check current breakdown"}
